expectations.text: Names specific AI writing patterns by category (e.g. 'rule of three', 'em dash overuse', 'inflated symbolism', 'promotional language') rather than giving vague 'make it more natural' advice
expectations.evidence: Output contains only rewritten prose with no meta-commentary naming pattern categories like 'inflated symbolism' or 'promotional language'.

expectations.text: Edited output is shorter than input
Removes or replaces promotional/inflated modifiers like 'passionate', 'purpose-driven', 'transformative', 'unwavering', 'thought leader'
expectations.evidence: None of the flagged modifiers appear; output uses plain language like 'building programs,' 'good at the unglamorous parts,' 'stays concrete.'

expectations.text: Fixes false agency / inanimate subject constructions like 'work doesn't just create programs — it catalyzes movements'
expectations.evidence: Subjects are human throughout ('Sarah has spent,' 'She started,' 'She does not talk'); 'her programs hold up' is standard usage, not inflated false agency.
